name: Ua Slipspeed Unisex Training Shoes
description: The most versatile training shoe we've ever made. The SlipSpeed™ convertible heel lets you go from a performance training shoe to a slide. Heel up to train, heel down for recovery. Engineered with cool-to-the-touch Iso-Chill technology inside, a breathable upper, and a BOA Fit System for a fast, personalized fit. They feel great, cushion better, fit perfectly, and handle your toughest workouts.

name: Ua Arc 96 Unisex Shoes
description: Inspired by the style of our founding year 1996—we packed this shoe with throwback vibes. Then we pulled UA HOVR™ cushioning from our high-tech running shoes for the impossible feeling of soft with a springy step.

name: Ua Drive Pro Clone Mens Golf Shoes
description: The new UA Drive Pro golf shoes are biomechanically engineered, and lab tested, to provide the traction, and diagonal and lateral support your feet need to unlock the power of your natural swing.

name: Ua Apparition Unisex Shoes
description: Originally launched in 2009, we brought back one of UA's first sneakers. These throwbacks are packed with authentic running shoe details but updated with fresh colors, leather upper detailing and soft UA HOVR™ cushioning.

name: Ua Echo Slipspeed Unisex Shoes
description: We pulled the best from our performance arsenal and reworked it for everyday flex. UA HOVR™ cushioning for a smooth ride. Asymmetrical laces from our soccer cleats for less pressure up top. And a sports tape-inspired upper that moves with you.

name: Ua Charged Commit Tr 5 Mens Training Shoes
description: These are serious training shoes. There's leather on the top of your foot to keep you stable, flex grooves on the bottom so you can move, and Charged Cushioning® for max impact absorption. All you need to do is work.

name: Ua Charged Chase Mens Running Shoes
description: These are running shoes anyone can wear to go faster—with Charged+ cushioning to help protect against impact, a breathable upper, and durability for miles.

name: Ua Halo Trainer Unisex Training Shoes
description: Adaptive HOVR foam softens the drop-in and powers the lift. A low-set base keeps you grounded through every set. The seamless SpeedForm upper fits like a second skin—flexing with you for frictionless support.

name: Ua Nova Slipspeed Unisex Shoes
description: Bungee lacing meets energy-returning UA HOVR™ foam meets a versatile sneaker-to-slide heel for a shoe that's as bold as it is comfortable

name: Ua Charged Expanse Mid Leather Waterproof Mens Hiking Boots
description: The mid-cut hiking boot built to handle any terrain. Waterproof leather upper, Charged Cushioning® midsole, and deep lug traction keep you comfortable and confident on every trail.

name: Ua Charged Assert 11 Camo Mens Running Shoes
description: Built to help you run faster, but this sneaker does it all. Our Charged+ Cushioning® propels you forward when you run and provides insane comfort for doing literally everything else. Plus a breathable upper, new leather overlays, and durability for miles. It’s the 11th release in our best-selling Assert line, so you know the details are dialed.

description: These are running shoes anyone can wear to go faster—with Charged Cushioning® to help protect against impact, a breathable upper, and durability for miles.
